scripts.start: npm install && composer install && npm run build && wp-env start
scripts.watch: npm run build && concurrently "wp-scripts start" "cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--disable-warning=DEP0180 npx gulp watch"
scripts.update: ncu -u --target minor -x 'sass' && rimraf node_modules/ package-lock.json && npm install
scripts.upgrade: ncu -u --target latest -x '@wordpress/env gulp gulp-autoprefixer gulp-sass sass' && rimraf node_modules/ package-lock.json && npm install
scripts.copy:files: cp -r build inc languages vendor *.txt *.png *.php composer.json dist/vk-blocks-pro
scripts.copy:files:free: cp -r build inc vendor *.txt *.png *.php composer.json dist/vk-blocks
scripts.dist: composer install --no-dev && npm run build && npm run clean:dist && npm run create:dist-dir && npm run copy:files && composer install && npm run zip
scripts.dist:free: rm -rf ./dist/vk-blocks/ && composer install --optimize-autoloader --prefer-dist --no-dev && npm run build:free && mkdir -p dist/vk-blocks && npm run copy:files:free && composer install && cd dist && zip -r vk-blocks.zip vk-blocks/
scripts.zip: npm run zip:pro && npm run zip:free
scripts.build:dev: composer install && wp-scripts build --webpack-copy-php --config webpack.config.js --progress --mode=development && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--disable-warning=DEP0180 gulp build:dev:pro
scripts.build: wp-scripts build --webpack-copy-php --config webpack.config.js --progress --mode=production && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--disable-warning=DEP0180 gulp build:pro && npm run build:js && npm run translate
scripts.build:cache: composer install && wp-scripts build --webpack-copy-php --config webpack.config.js --progress --mode=development --env enableCache=true && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--disable-warning=DEP0180 gulp build:dev:pro
scripts.build:free: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--disable-warning=DEP0180 gulp text-domain-free && wp-scripts build --webpack-copy-php --config webpack.config.js && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--disable-warning=DEP0180 gulp build:free && npm run build:js
scripts.update-po: npm run build:pot && node bin/update-po.js languages/vk-blocks-pro-ja.po languages/vk-blocks-pro.pot
scripts.translate: npm run translate:block && npm run translate:admin && cd languages && wp i18n make-php . && cd ../
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:php
scripts.lint:check: npm run lint:js:check && npm run lint:php:check
scripts.lint:js: wp-scripts format src/ test/e2e/ && wp-scripts lint-js src/ test/e2e/ --fix
scripts.lint:js:check: wp-scripts format src/ test/e2e/ --check && wp-scripts lint-js src/ test/e2e/
scripts.lint:php: composer install && composer format && composer phpcs
scripts.fixtures:regenerate: npm run build && npm run fixtures:clean && npm run fixtures:generate
scripts.test-unit: npm run test-unit:clean && npm run fixtures:regenerate
scripts.phpunit: composer install && wp-env run cli --config .wp-env.tests.json --env-cwd='wp-content/plugins/vk-blocks-pro' vendor/bin/phpunit -c .phpunit.xml
scripts.phpunit:free: composer install && wp-env run cli --config .wp-env.tests.json --env-cwd='wp-content/plugins/vk-blocks' vendor/bin/phpunit -c .phpunit.xml
scripts.reinstall: rimraf node_modules/ && npm install && npm run build
